feat.name: Proud Nail
feat.text: When a foe ignores your taunts, you make them pay. Make a melee Strike against your taunted enemy. If this Strike hits, you deal an extra die of weapon damage. If you’re at least 10th level, increase this to two extra dice, and if you’re at least 18th level, increase it to three extra dice.

traits.name: Flourish
traits.text: Actions with the flourish trait are special techniques that require too much exertion for you to perform frequently. You can use only one action with the flourish trait per round.

traits.name: Guardian
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the guardian class.

feat.requirement: Your taunted enemy is off-guard because it didn't target you or include you in an area effect.
